name: High Contrast Color Anima
base_prompt: masterpiece, best quality, high-quality Anima anime illustration, clean Niji anime color separation, vivid high-contrast color accents, cool clean rim light, controlled contrast, refined anime hair detail, crisp 2D anime line clarity, balanced luminous color palette
negative_prompt: worst quality, low quality, score_1, score_2, score_3, artist name, flat pastel coloring, washed out, low contrast

source-color-style-neutral.prompt_prefix: Niji anime coloring, high-contrast color palette, clean color separation, cool rim light, controlled anime contrast
source-color-style-neutral.prompt_suffix: refined 2D anime finish, crisp anime hair detail, balanced luminous background separation
source-color-style-neutral.negative_prompt: black armor, sword, black hair, woman, armor, medieval costume, source character, exact source pose

source-image-131966887.prompt_prefix: Niji anime color reference, high-contrast color palette, clean color separation, cool rim light, controlled anime contrast
source-image-131966887.prompt_suffix: refined 2D anime finish, crisp anime hair detail, balanced luminous color palette

anime-2d-default.prompt_prefix: high-contrast niji color lock: vivid clean color separation, cool clean rim light, soft crisp anime shadows, bright school campus; pure hand-drawn 2D Japanese anime
anime-2d-default.prompt_suffix: anime only on face, eyes, lineart; flat matte cel colors, clean ink line, hand-painted background, no 3D lighting
anime-2d-default.negative_prompt: 3d, 3d render, cgi, photorealistic, realistic skin, semi-realistic, glossy skin, glossy highlight rendering, sharp specular highlights, plastic skin, game cg, gloomy background, dark cinematic color grading, deep shadow contrast

required_resources.note: This preset is a high-contrast color / Niji clean color-separation resource stack. It must not imply any source-image scene, time-of-day, or background content. Actual generation should use all three LoraLoaderModelOnly nodes.
